violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC, ticket has been placed for repairs. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The hand-washing sink in produce prep area was blocked by a food rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
The hand-washing sink in the produce room was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Deli meat and cheese was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All deli meat and cheese in prep room that was cut this morning was moved to walk-in cooler. All other food that was prepared on 12/1 and 12/2 was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in deli prep room until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Cooked, ROP imitation crab meat was observed held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Per manufacturing label, product must be held between 32-38 DF. Product was moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Establishment is to ensure that refrigeration holding the imitation crab meat, meets the requirements of the manufactures label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Deli meat and lettuce was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Deli meat and lettuce were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in the cold draw until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF. Food located in the pizza prep unit was observed fluctuating between 42-43 DF. Establishment is to monitor food in unit, and service unit as needed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Breakfast sandwiches were observed being held past 4 hours. Establishment must dispose of food after 4 hours when using time as a public health control. Breakfast sandwiches were disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The following equipment was observed in poor repair and not maintaining proper temperatures. -Deli prep room -Pizza prep unit -Sandwich station cold draw Equipment must be in good repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in these units until they are able to keep food at 41 DF or less. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
The bakery walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Establishment does not have a written list of ingredients for pastries on display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The hand-washing sink in the prepared foods department was blocked by (a bread cart). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
ROP shrimp was observed thawing with package still intact. PIC informed and removed shrimp from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
Thermometers in the deli and meat department display cases are in poor repair. Thermometers are not displaying temperatures. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery walk in cooler area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The following physical facilities observed with and accumulation of debris: 1. fans in the meat walk in cooler and chicken prep cooler observed with dust. 2.ceilings in prepared food walk in cooler has dust. 3.walls in produce prep area and chicken prep area observed with soil residue and debris. 4.floors in produce and bakery area observed with food residue and/or other debris. 2. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
Thermometer in meat display cooler in poor repair. Thermometer not accurately displaying temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Meat display cooler located in the meat department area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures). PIC relocated meats during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
